nasb.text: Praise the Lord in song, for He has done excellent things; Let this be known throughout the earth.

esv.text: “Sing praises to the Lord, for he has done gloriously; let this be made known in all the earth.

cnv.text: 你們要唱歌讚美耶和華，因為他作了極美的事； 願這事傳遍全地。

ccb.text: “耶和华成就了奇妙的事， 要向祂歌唱， 让歌声传遍世界。

csbs.text: 你们当歌颂耶和华，因他做了显赫的事， 愿全地都知道。
